# Canonicalize equivalence classes. Every URL in a blank-line-delimited
# block must map to the same canonical form. Blank lines separate
# classes; lines starting with # are comments.
https://github.com/foo/bar
https://github.com/foo/bar.git
https://github.com/foo/bar/
https://GITHUB.com/foo/bar
https://github.com:443/foo/bar.git

ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git
ssh://git@github.com:22/foo/bar.git
git@github.com:foo/bar.git
git@github.com:foo/bar
